'''Thaks''' were a creature used as traditional transport on [[Eiattu 6]]. [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr Ilo]] was an excellent Thak rider, having been trained in her childhood.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 15|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 15]] {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 28|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 28]] {{Mo}}
